title: Trace T-Echo GNSS PPS connectivity
description: Trace GNSS 1PPS nets through each official schematic/PCB artifact to nRF52840 pins and exposed pads or headers.
notes: Routing: classic/Plus L76K pin 4 1PPS via R0 1K net PPS to nRF P1.04; Air530 alternate also maps PPS to P1.04. No classic/Plus PPS connector/test-point shown. Lite V1.0 GPS_1PPS maps external 1x7 P1.15 and KiCad through-hole pad 2 to nRF P1.15. Card V1.0 L76K 1PPS net GPS_PPS_P0.23 reaches nRF P0.23; no PPS connector/test-point shown.
